settings.heading:
Blitz spirit is what you need
when your back is against the wall.

settings.text: FACED WITH ADVERSITY, YOU DIG DEEP, CARRY ON — AND STICK THE KETTLE ON

settings.heading: The bombs fell. The kettle went on.
settings.body:
Fifty-seven consecutive nights of bombing. Whole streets gone by morning. And the response of ordinary Londoners — telephonists, bus drivers, shopkeepers, kids — was to get up, dust off, and carry on out of sheer bloody-mindedness.

They called it blitz spirit: the attitude of a city that refused to be told when it was beaten. The pubs stayed open, mostly. The pint was had.

“There was one thing about which there was never any doubt. The courage, the unconquerable grit and stamina of our people. Upon that rock, all stand unshakeable.” — Winston Churchill

settings.heading: Still at it.
settings.body:
The designs carry the attitude: Boudica with her trident, a skull in a bowler hat, a roundel built letter by letter from the brand name. Heritage with a straight face and a raised eyebrow — ironic and iconic, never costume-party.

And backbone has no postcode. If you’ve ever been up against it and dug deep, you already know the feeling — the shirt just gets there first.

“The Blitz, the weather, the economy, the queue at the pub — none of these will keep me down. I will get my pint, no matter what.” — A regular, undefeated.

settings.heading: Keep your humour.
settings.body: If you can laugh at it, it hasn’t won. No nonsense. No fuss.

settings.heading: Wakey wakey.
settings.body: Join the Home Guard: first word on new drops, restocks and stories worth telling — plus 10% off your first order. No spam. That would be nonsense.
